title: Smoky Mexican Roasted Zucchini
description: A flavorful and nutritious Mexican-inspired dish featuring roasted zucchini, smoky flavors, and a hint of Ukrainian spices.

ingredients.name: Smoky Roasted Red Peppers
ingredients.notes: Roasted in a 400°F oven for 30 minutes

ingredients.name: Ukrainian Sausage Seasoning
ingredients.notes: Add a pinch of smoked paprika for smokiness

ingredients.name: Roast Garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince and mix with lime juice

instructions: Toss zucchini with olive oil, salt, and black pepper. Spread on a baking sheet.
Roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender and lightly browned.
In a small bowl, mix together roasted red peppers, Ukrainian sausage seasoning, and minced garlic.
Brush the roasted pepper mixture onto the zucchini.
Sprinkle with cilantro and a squeeze of lime juice.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
